case_title: BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP, LLC VS. YURIY DOBRY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOBRY, YURIY DBA YURIY DOBRY, M.D. & YURIY DOBRY $65,002.76 PRINCIPAL, $3,125.47 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $68,578.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
